reply_original_language: Lamento mucho los inconvenientes causados. Por favor, reenvíe sus documentos con mayor calidad para que podamos proceder con la verificación. Gracias por su paciencia.
reply_english: I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. Please resubmit your documents in higher quality so that we can proceed with the verification. Thank you for your patience.

reply_original_language: Kami memahami bahwa situasi ini sangat tidak menyenangkan dan Anda mengalami kerugian. Kami akan meninjau keadaan panggilan margin Anda dan memberikan klarifikasi lebih lanjut. Terima kasih atas kesabaran Anda.
reply_english: We understand that this situation is very upsetting and you have incurred a loss. We will review your margin call circumstances and provide further clarification. Thank you for your patience.

reply_original_language: 感谢您的耐心，我们将调查缺少的KYC文件并进行升级处理。请您稍等，我们会尽快与您联系。感谢您对我们的理解与支持。
reply_english: Thank you for your patience. We will investigate the missing KYC documents and escalate this matter for resolution. Please hold on, and we will get back to you as soon as possible. We appreciate your understanding and support.

reply_original_language: نعتذر عن الإرباك الذي حصل. يبدو أن حسابك لا يستوفي شروط البونص، وسنعمل على تحسين التواصل في المستقبل. إذا كان لديك أي استفسارات أخرى فلا تتردد في طرحها.
reply_english: We apologize for the confusion. It appears your account does not meet the bonus eligibility criteria, and we will work on improving our communication in the future. If you have any further questions, please feel free to ask.
